history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A black and white, close-up, low-angle, full-body shot of a young man in athletic sweatpants, taking a mirror selfie. He is facing away from the camera, looking over his left shoulder with his head turned to the right, revealing his profile. His skin is speckled with small dots, and his back and arms are muscular and defined, showcasing his physique. The lighting is dramatic and high-contrast, casting strong shadows that accentuate the contours of his body. The background is dimly lit and appears to be a bathroom, with a framed mirror, a door, and cabinets visible. The overall mood is intimate and self-reflective, with a focus on the human form and the starkness of black and white photography. The image has a gritty, raw aesthetic.
